function.name: OrbitalFractureReconstruction
function.description: Guided interactive workflow for OrbitalFractureReconstruction. Execute steps in order. Interactive steps require user 3D interaction. Steps: 'cb_step_1': In the "Input CT volume" section, select the CT volume for processing.; 'cb_step_2': In the "Markups" module, click "ROI" to create an empty MarkupsROI node named "Orbital_Region".; 'cb_step_3': Manually click and adjust on the Slice views to create the ROI for the "Orbital_Region". (interactive: roi); 'cb_step_4': In the "Bounding box (ROI)" section, select the MarkupsROI node.; 'cb_step_5': Click the "Cut the volume with ROI" button.; 'cb_step_6': In the "Segment Editor" module, create a new segmentation named "Bone_Segmentation" for the "OFR_CutVolume" volume node.; 'cb_step_7': In the "Segment Editor" module, click the "Add" button and rename the segment to "Bone_Segment".; 'cb_step_8': In the "Segment Editor" module, click the "Threshold" button.; 'cb_step_9': In the "Segment Editor" module, adjust the threshold slider to set the segmentation range.; 'cb_step_10': In the "Segment Editor" module, click the "Apply" button.

user_action.description: Action: 'start' to begin a step, 'proceed' after user completes interaction, 'skip' for optional steps, 'cancel' to abort workflow, 'choice_made' for user_choice steps

choice_value.description: Value selected by the user for user_choice steps. Required when user_action is 'choice_made'.
